queries.sql: CASE WHEN department = 'Sales' AND salary > 60000 THEN 'Senior' ELSE 'Standard' END = 'Senior'
queries.explanation: Tests complex AND logic inside the WHEN condition.

queries.sql: CASE WHEN performance_score > 4.0 THEN 'Top' END IS NULL
queries.explanation: Tests the implicit NULL fallback when an ELSE clause is omitted and no WHEN conditions are met.

queries.sql: CASE WHEN department = 'Engineering' THEN (CASE WHEN salary > 100000 THEN 'Principal' ELSE 'Engineer' END) ELSE 'Non-Eng' END = 'Principal'
CASE WHEN salary BETWEEN 50000 AND 70000 THEN 'Band A' WHEN salary > 70000 THEN 'Band B' ELSE 'Unknown' END = 'Band B'
queries.explanation: Tests multi-branch CASE statements with BETWEEN evaluation.
